name: Weimob
description: Chinese SaaS providing WeChat mini program e-commerce, CRM, marketing and store management.

seo.title: Weimob — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Weimob: Chinese SaaS providing WeChat mini program e-commerce, CRM, marketing and store management.

when_to_use: WeChat mini program e-commerce store for Chinese SMBs
CRM and marketing automation for WeChat-based commerce
Loyalty program and promotions via Weimob marketing platform
Omnichannel store management integrating WeChat and offline POS
API-driven inventory and order sync for Chinese online merchants

pros: Full WeChat commerce stack in one SaaS
Native mini-program templates save dev time
cons: English docs and support nearly absent
review.verdict: Practical commerce suite for Chinese SMBs on WeChat — irrelevant if you're not selling into mainland China.
review.best_for: Chinese SMBs running WeChat-first commerce with CRM and marketing needs
review.not_for: International brands or any team outside the WeChat ecosystem
